claim.details: Implemented an optional OpenClaw plugin adapter that registers the typed agent_end hook and generates local Receipts via a new 'receipts openclaw agent-end' CLI command. Added plugin manifest/config, event payload conversion, OpenClaw metadata/evidence capture, tests, README docs, and OpenSpec task completion.

evidence.label: hook verification note
evidence.note: OpenClaw hook path tested through synthetic agent_end payload and plugin capture heuristics; live gateway plugin install not performed in this sprint.

recommended_next_action: Review the receipt and supporting evidence.
